params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: 48차 perplexity V7-E engine intercept fix per #706 V7-D FAIL (HTTP/2 framing protocol error). V7-E explicitly calls convert_to_http2_response on synthetic thread doc, then sets is_http2=0 to signal 'already converted'. Should produce valid H2 frames without poisoning connection.

test_steps: 2. Submit PII prompt → engine fires V7-C SSE block
4. Synthetic thread doc returned via PROPER HTTP/2 frames
6. Other perplexity requests (analytics, widgets) on same connection succeed normally
7. SPA renders thread page with warning visible

verdict_criteria.OK: warning bubble visible + no HTTP/2 protocol errors + collateral requests OK
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_h2_clean_but_no_bubble: H2 errors gone but SPA doesn't render warning — synthetic thread doc shape mismatch, escalate V7-F (HAR-based shape refinement)
verdict_criteria.FAIL: still HTTP/2 errors — V7-E conversion logic wrong

notes: 48차 V7-E engine fix per #706 verdict. Explicit convert_to_http2_response prevents H2 framing corruption.
